styleGuide.lineStyle: 手绘简笔画风格，全部使用纯黑色实线（RGB: 0,0,0），线条宽度在1-4px之间自然变化，有明显手绘压感（细-粗-细过渡）。笔触松散、有机，带有轻微抖动，呈现出像用Apple Pencil在Procreate上随手画出的质感。避免任何灰色、渐变或半透明效果，确保矢量化时线条清晰。
styleGuide.characterStyle: 火柴人造型：圆形头部（约2-3笔），单线条身体和四肢（手臂、腿各1笔），无细节填充。五官用最简笔画表示（如点状眼睛、弧形嘴巴）。额外元素（如汗珠）用3-5笔小椭圆或短弧线表示，风格一致。
styleGuide.iconStyle: 所有图标/符号采用极简几何化表达，每个元素笔画控制在5-15笔内。例如：闹钟用圆形表盘+两个指针+顶部小铃铛（约8笔）；纸币用矩形轮廓+内部两条横线（约5笔）；大脑轮廓用不规则曲线围成闭合形状（约10笔）；金字塔用三角形分层，底层、中层、顶部用水平线分隔（约8笔）。所有图标不包含任何文字、数字或符号。
styleGuide.compositionRules: 16:9横版画布（例如1920×1080）。每个场景中元素之间留足至少15%画布宽度的空白间隔，形成视觉上独立的“岛”式分布。元素不重叠，避免拥挤。整体构图遵循三分法或对角线平衡，确保画面透气、清晰。
styleGuide.moodAndTone: 轻松、幽默且富有启发性的教育氛围。手绘质感带来亲切感和温度，简洁线条突出核心概念，避免视觉干扰。黑白对比强烈，传递出理性、清爽、专注的感觉。
styleGuide.consistencyNotes: 1. 所有场景线条均使用相同手绘笔触设定（粗细节奏、抖动幅度一致）。2. 人物（火柴人）的身体比例、头部大小、手臂角度等在所有场景中保持一致。3. 图标风格统一：圆形、矩形、三角形等基本图形采用相同曲率和手绘处理方式。4. 无任何文字、字母、数字或标点符号。5. 背景纯白#FFFFFF，无纹理、网格或渐变。6. 所有元素边缘清晰，与白色背景形成高对比，便于矢量化处理。

scenes.imagePrompt: A hand-drawn doodle illustration in the style of iPad Procreate sketch, pure black lines on white background. The scene is divided into three clear zones with ample white space. On the left side, a stick figure is seated at a simple desk with a computer monitor. The stick figure has a round head (two curved lines), dot eyes, a small arc mouth, and a single-line body with arms reaching toward the keyboard. On top of the head, three small oval sweat drops (each 3-5 strokes) indicate hard work. The desk is a simple horizontal line, the monitor is a rounded rectangle with a thin base. In the upper right quadrant, a large alarm clock drawn with minimal strokes: a circular outline, two small bells on top, and two hands (one very short, one long and thick) spinning fast, indicated by motion lines (short curved arcs around the clock face). The clock is oversized relative to the figure. In the lower right corner, three banknotes are scattered loosely: each is a simple rectangle with two horizontal lines inside, slightly rotated to show disorder. All lines are solid black with natural pen pressure variation (1-4px), slightly wobbly and organic, giving a casual hand-drawn feel. No shading, no gray, no text. The composition follows a diagonal balance: left-center figure, upper right clock, lower right money. Ample negative space between elements (at least 15% canvas width). Aspect ratio 16:9.
scenes.negativePrompt: Avoid any text, letters, numbers, punctuation, symbols. No color except pure black and white. No gray gradients, no semi-transparency, no brush splatter effects. No detailed realistic rendering, no shading, no shadows. No background textures, grids, or patterns. No overlapping elements; keep each element isolated with clear separation. No thick outlines beyond 4px. No mechanical perfect lines; must look hand-drawn with slight wobble. No complex backgrounds or furniture beyond the essential desk.
scenes.compositionNotes: 16:9 landscape (e.g., 1920x1080). Left area: stick figure and desk/computer occupy left 35% of canvas, centered vertically. Upper right: large alarm clock in top right quadrant, about 25% of canvas size, placed with its center at roughly (70% width, 25% height). Lower right: three banknotes scattered in bottom right quadrant, occupying about 20% of canvas, placed with centers around (85% width, 75% height). Leave at least 15% canvas width gap between figure group and clock, and between clock and notes. The figure group should not touch the clock or notes. The overall composition is balanced with a diagonal flow from lower left (figure) to upper right (clock) to lower right (money).

scenes.imagePrompt: A single minimalist hand-drawn brain outline in the center of a 16:9 white canvas. The brain is drawn with loose, organic black lines (RGB:0,0,0) simulating Apple Pencil on Procreate, with natural pressure variation (1-4px line width). The outline is a continuous curved shape with slight jitter, approximately 10 strokes, forming a simplified brain silhouette (two hemispheres with sulci represented by a few gentle indentations). The interior of the brain is completely empty white space, no internal details. The lines are crisp and high contrast against the pure white background (#FFFFFF). No text, numbers, or symbols. The brain is isolated in the middle, surrounded by ample blank space (at least 15% canvas width on each side) to allow for animation separation. The style matches the previous scene's hand-drawn simplicity and educational tone.
scenes.negativePrompt: No text, letters, numbers, punctuation, or symbols. No realistic or detailed brain anatomy. No grey areas, gradients, or semi-transparency. No background textures, grids, or colors other than pure white. No shadows or 3D effects. No multiple elements - only a single brain outline. No fill or shading inside the brain.
scenes.compositionNotes: Brain outline centered horizontally and vertically on a 16:9 canvas (e.g., 1920x1080). The brain should occupy about 30-40% of the canvas height, leaving generous margins all around. The outline is a closed shape with a few gentle curves; keep strokes loose but recognizable as a brain silhouette. Ensure the line has natural hand-drawn waviness and slight thickening at turns (e.g., where curve changes direction). No other elements appear in this scene.

scenes.imagePrompt: 一个手绘简笔画风格的三层金字塔结构图，纯黑色线条绘制在纯白背景上。金字塔位于画面中央，由松散有机的手绘线条构成，带有自然的压感粗细变化（1-4px）。金字塔呈等腰三角形，底部水平，两侧斜边向上收拢，内部用两条水平线分隔成三层，线条之间保留明显的空白间隔。底层（最宽）内部绘制一个极简火柴人站立，圆形头部，单线条身体和四肢，手臂自然下垂，代表执行；中层内部绘制一个简笔文件夹轮廓，矩形加顶部半圆标签，一条竖线从中穿过，代表管理；顶层（最窄）内部绘制一个简笔灯泡，圆形灯泡壳和底部螺旋底座，代表决策。每个图标仅用5-10笔完成，线条有手绘抖动效果，与金字塔边界之间留有清晰空白，不粘连。整体构图平稳，金字塔约占画面高度70%，左右对称，上下留白充裕。无任何文字、数字、字母或符号，纯黑白高对比，适合矢量化。
scenes.negativePrompt: 任何文字、数字、字母、标点符号；写实风格；灰色渐变或半透明；复杂背景或纹理；网格或辅助线；过多的装饰细节；毛笔飞白效果；金字塔内部填充实色或图案；元素重叠粘连；线条机械完美无抖动。
scenes.compositionNotes: 画面为16：9横版，金字塔严格居中放置，底边距画布下边缘约15%高度，顶部距上边缘约15%高度。金字塔左右对称，两侧空白宽度相等。内部三层的高度比例大致为底层40%、中层35%、顶层25%。每个内部图标定位于对应层的中心位置，与上下水平线保持至少5%画布宽度的距离，避免接触。所有线条均为纯黑实线，背景纯白。
